creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Not reproducible with 56.0.3.65 on GhostBSD, Waterfox installed today: 

$ date ; uname -v
Thu  1 Mar 2018 01:37:44 GMT
FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE #0 r321309: Fri Jul 21 02:08:28 UTC 2017     root@releng2.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC 
$ pkg info waterfox | grep Version
Version        : 56.0.3.65
